titleStmt.title: SII 6.949: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 949. (A.R. No. 308 of 1899). IN THE TWENTY-EIGHTH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakavatsarē vasuviyattigmāṁśusaṁkhyāyutē śuklē kā¨rttikanāgapaṁcchamadinē siṁhyācalādhīśituḥ . bhaṁḍḍā
rē varadīpadaṁḍasahitākhaṁḍapradīpāya tāḥ paṁcchāśat pramitā Ajāśca kanakaṁ ḍappābhujaṁggā
hvayaḥ . 1 śūrō dhīraguṇānvitaḥ priyahitassōmāyarāvuttukaḥ kastūrāya sudhāya nāraṇapaḍī
rāyīhvaputrōttamakṣēmāyu¨rvvarakī¨rttipū¨rttivijayaśrīpuṣṭitējōmahāśau¨ryyau
dā¨ryyamahat guṇānabhilaṣannācaṁdratāraṁ dadau . 2 svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1208 gunēṁṭṭi kā¨rtti
ka śukla nāgapaṁcchamiyu nnādivāramunāṁḍu śrīnarasiṁhanāthuni sannidhini nityamu nakhaṁ
ḍadīpamu Ettuṭakunu kasturādhāyinārāyaṇapaḍirāyani putruṁḍu ḍappābhujaṁ
gu ssōmāyirāvuttu tanaku nāyurārōgyaiśva[¨r*]yyābhivṛddhigānu śrīnarasiṁhyanā
thuni bhaṁḍāramuna dīpadaṁḍamunnu Eṁbhayi goṟiyalaṁ beṭṭi Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigā
nu dhārāpū¨rvvakamu sēsi Icche Ī dha[¨r*]mmuvu śrīvaiṣṇavula rakṣa .
Digital edition of SII 6.949 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
